hooks.command: bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/welcome.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/memory-check.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/subagent-start.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && node .claude/hooks/ralph-check.js'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/stop-state-sync.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && node .claude/hooks/agent007-statusline.js'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/sdd-test-guard.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/context-window-guard.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/format-on-save.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/sdd-auto-test.py'
bash -c 'set -- $(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | head -1); cd $1 && python3 .claude/hooks/constraint-reinforcement.py'

bash -c 'if command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e '"'"'display notification "Claude necesita tu atención" with title "Agent007" sound name "Glass"'"'"' 2>/dev/null; elif command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send "Agent007" "Claude necesita tu atención" 2>/dev/null; fi; true'
